headline: Equity returns likely to moderate, but dips remain buying opportunities: GS
summary: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs said equity returns are likely to moderate following a sharp rally but maintained an overweight stance on stocks over a 12-month horizon, telling investors they should buy any pullbacks in the coming months.
